title: pilosella lactucella subsp. lampreilema
intro: Pilosella lactucella subsp. lampreilema is a subspecies of the Pilosella lactucella plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella lactucella subsp. lampreilema include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
